title: glibc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.

  - Forward-port Oracle patches for ol9
    Reviewed by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  April-18-2023 Cupertino Miranda <cupertino.miranda@oracle.com> - 2.34-60.0.2
  - OraBug 35305078 Glibc tunable to disable huge pages on pthread_create stacks
  - Created tunable glibc.pthread.stack_hugetlb to control when hugepages
    can be used for stack allocation.
  - In case THP are enabled and glibc.pthread.stack_hugetlb is set to
    0, glibc will madvise the kernel not to use allow hugepages for stack
    allocations.
    Reviewed by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  March-28-2023 Cupertino Miranda <cupertino.miranda@oracle.com> - 2.34-60.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol9-u2 beta
    Reviewed by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  September-28-2022 Patrick McGehearty <patrick.mcgehearty@oracle.com> - 2.34-40.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches for ol9-u1 beta
    Reviewed by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>
  April-25-2022 Patrick McGehearty <patrick.mcgehearty@oracle.com> - 2.34-28.0.1
  - Merge Oracle patches with ol9 beta
  - Reviewed-by: Jose E. Marchesi <jose.marchesi@oracle.com>

[2.34-168.24]
- nss: Group merge does not react to ERANGE during merge (RHEL-114261)

[2.34-168.23]
- Fix namespace pollution in inet_ntop with fortification (RHEL-106230)

[2.34-168.22]
- CVE-2025-8058: Double free in regcomp (RHEL-105328)

[2.34-168.21]
- iconv: Do not create executable output files (RHEL-104150)

[2.34-168.20]
- CVE-2025-5702 glibc: Vector register overwrite bug in glibc (RHEL-95547)

[2.34-168.19]
- elf: Keep using minimal malloc after early DTV resize (RHEL-93877)

[2.34-168.18]
- Fix deadlock in popen after multi-threaded fork (RHEL-93665)

[2.34-168.17]
- x86: Avoid integer truncation with large cache sizes (RHEL-71583)

[2.34-168.16]
- SGID test enhancements (RHEL-92690)
